qas.q: There are __________ teams aligned to carry out the three cyberspace mission areas of the DOD.

qas.a: Cyber National Mission Force HQ (CNMF-HQ); Joint Force HQ-Cyber (JFHQ-C); JFHQ-DODIN.

qas.q: Cyber National Mission Force HQ responsibilities
qas.a: Provide C2 to NMTs, NSTs, and national CPTs.

qas.a: Direct and sync full spectrum cyber ops to deter, disrupt, and defeat adversary actors.

qas.q: Cyber HQ supporting USEUCOM, USSTRATCOM, and USTRANSCOM
qas.a: AFCYBER.

qas.a: Defend the US against cyberspace attacks of significant consequence.

qas.q: Three teams that make up the national mission force
qas.a: National Mission Team (NMT), national support team, national cyber protection team.

qas.a: Combatant Command (CCMD) support.

qas.q: __________ and __________ make up the combat mission force.
qas.a: Combat Mission Team (CMT), Combat Support Team (CST).
